proposals.proposedChange: Run governed review for contract_mutation_frequency and stage deterministic process experiment only.
proposals.reason: Average contract mutation events per run cycle from proposals and version events.

proposals.proposedChange: Run governed review for duplicate_pattern_pressure and stage deterministic process experiment only.
proposals.reason: Duplicate topology pressure derived from promoted pattern-card topology overlap.

proposals.proposedChange: Run governed review for entropy_trend and stage deterministic process experiment only.
proposals.reason: Run-cycle entropy budget trend across the observed deterministic window.

proposals.proposedChange: Run governed review for promotion_latency and stage deterministic process experiment only.
proposals.reason: Average elapsed hours from run cycle creation to promotion decision.

proposals.proposedChange: Run governed review for supersede_rate and stage deterministic process experiment only.
proposals.reason: Share of promotion decisions that supersede already-promoted patterns.

proposals.proposedChange: Run governed review for unresolved_draft_age and stage deterministic process experiment only.
proposals.reason: Average age in days of unresolved draft pattern cards.
